itemDisplayName: Create a web app health model with discovery
description: This template creates an Azure Health Model with a three-tier web application structure (Frontend, Backend, Data), each with an Azure Resource Graph discovery rule that finds resources by type and tag. Additional manually-created entities demonstrate how to model things that discovery cannot find. Recommended signals are added to all discovered resources automatically.
summary: Create a web app health model combining ARG discovery with additional manually-created entities.
